description_long: This is a compact, modern axe featuring a robust, orange handle with a black, textured grip for enhanced control and comfort. The handle is slightly curved and ergonomically shaped, likely made from a durable composite or reinforced plastic. The axe head is made of dark, weathered metal with a broad, wedge-shaped blade and a flat poll on the opposite side, suitable for both chopping and hammering tasks. The blade has a distinctive, angular profile with visible wear marks, suggesting frequent use. The head is securely mounted to the handle with a visible metal fastener, indicating a modern assembly method. The overall design is practical and rugged, ideal for urban utility or emergency use.
description: A compact, modern axe with an orange ergonomic handle and a broad, weathered metal blade, designed for utility and durability.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the orange handle, black grip, and the full profile of the broad, dark metal blade.
description_view_1: A narrow, top-down view showing the thin edge of the blade and the slim profile of the handle.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the orange handle and the full blade profile visible.
description_view_3: A bottom-up view showing the pointed end of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, ergonomic handle made of orange plastic with a black, ribbed rubber grip; oval cross-section for secure hold.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and angular edge; single cutting edge with visible wear marks.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern mounting with visible metal fastener securing the blade to the handle.
